infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: PTE Flow needs camera access to scan QR codes for joining leaderboard groups and connecting with other students.
infoPlist.NSLocalNetworkUsageDescription: PTE Flow needs local network access to detect available study groups on the same WiFi network.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: PTE Flow needs location access to detect WiFi networks for group formation and leaderboard features.

plugins.cameraPermission: PTE Flow needs camera access to scan QR codes for joining leaderboard groups and connecting with other students.
plugins.microphonePermission: PTE Flow needs microphone access for speaking practice modules.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: PTE Flow needs location access to detect WiFi networks for group formation.
plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: PTE Flow needs location access to detect WiFi networks for group formation.
